description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wardrobe with a natural wood grain finish on the front and sides, and a plain white back panel. The front features two vertically aligned doors with subtle, minimalist handles and four small drawers at the bottom, each with its own handle. The wood texture is light brown with visible knots and grain patterns, giving it a modern yet rustic appearance. The sides are finished in a slightly different, more muted wood tone, while the back is a solid white, likely for placement against a wall. The wardrobe stands on short, sturdy feet, elevating it slightly above the ground. Its design suggests ample storage space inside, suitable for clothing and personal items.
description: A tall, wood-grain wardrobe with two front doors, four bottom drawers, and a white back panel. The design is modern and functional, with minimalist handles and a natural finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two vertical doors with minimalist handles and four small drawers at the bottom.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a continuous wood grain panel with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_2: Back view featuring a plain, solid white panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing a wood grain panel without handles or openings.
